Bash("C:\\Users\\wende\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python.exe" -c "
import importlib.metadata
print\(''docling:'', importlib.metadata.version\(''docling''\)\)
print\(''docling-core:'', importlib.metadata.version\(''docling-core''\)\)

from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter
conv = DocumentConverter\(\)

# Quick test: convert the PDF directly
result = conv.convert\(''geller2001-2002 west meets east early greek and babylonian diagnosis afo 48-49.pdf''\)
doc = result.document

# Explore structure
print\(''Type:'', type\(doc\)\)
print\(''Dir:'', [x for x in dir\(doc\) if not x.startswith\(''_''\)]\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\wende\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python.exe" -c "
from docling_core.types.doc import DoclingDocument
import inspect

# Check iterate_items signature and doc
sig = inspect.signature\(DoclingDocument.iterate_items\)
print\(''iterate_items sig:'', sig\)

# Check what fields DoclingDocument has
print\(''\\nFields:''\)
for name, field in DoclingDocument.model_fields.items\(\):
    print\(f''  {name}: {field.annotation}''\)
")
